_comment: One shard per specialty. Canonical code-wise detail. procedure_code is the primary key + FK into data/stg/<code>.json. New shape: typed `pricing` (deterministic money) + freeform `additional_information` (LLM-readable long-tail) + `source_refs` (provenance for every fact).

additional_information.laterality_note: Priced per eye; bilateral same-sitting follows the multi-procedure 100/50 rule

source_refs.rates_inr / implant: HBP-2022.pdf master row SE020A (Tier3/Tier2/Tier1 + Foldable IOL +3000)
source_refs.billing_unit / quantity_basis: HBP-2022.pdf (cataract is a one-time per-eye surgical package)
source_refs.additional_information.alos / min_doctor: Cataract Surgery (Phaco and SICS)_Medco.pdf — Intro + ALOS section
